parameters.jsCode:
const input = $input.first()?.json ?? {};
const source = input.query ?? input;
const headers = source.headers ?? input.headers ?? {};
const clean = (value) => value === null || value === undefined ? '' : String(value).trim();
const deriveBaseUrl = (headers, fallback) => {
  const forwardedProto = clean(headers['x-forwarded-proto']);
  const forwardedHost = clean(headers['x-forwarded-host']);
  const host = forwardedHost || clean(headers.host);
  const forwardedPort = clean(headers['x-forwarded-port']);
  if (!host) return fallback;
  const proto = forwardedProto || 'http';
  let authority = host;
  if (forwardedPort && !authority.includes(':')) {
    const isDefaultPort = (proto === 'http' && forwardedPort === '80') || (proto === 'https' && forwardedPort === '443');
    if (!isDefaultPort) authority = `${authority}:${forwardedPort}`;
  }
  return `${proto}://${authority}`;
};
const sqlLiteral = (value) => `'${String(value).replace(/'/g, "''")}'`;
const rawBatchId = clean(source.batch_id ?? source.batchId);
const rawSourceId = clean(source.source_id ?? source.sourceId ?? source.item_id ?? source.itemId);
const rawSourceTable = clean(source.source_table ?? source.sourceTable) || 'signup_batch_manual_items';
const validSourceTables = new Set(['signup_batch_manual_items', 'member_signups']);
const parsedBatchId = Number.parseInt(rawBatchId, 10);
const parsedSourceId = Number.parseInt(rawSourceId, 10);
const confirmDelete = ['1', 'true', 'yes', 'delete'].includes(clean(source.confirm ?? source.confirmed).toLowerCase());
const fallbackBaseUrl = 'http://n8n:5678';
const n8nBaseUrl = deriveBaseUrl(headers, fallbackBaseUrl);
if (!Number.isInteger(parsedBatchId) || parsedBatchId <= 0 || !Number.isInteger(parsedSourceId) || parsedSourceId <= 0 || !validSourceTables.has(rawSourceTable)) {
  return [{
    json: {
      batch_id: rawBatchId,
      source_id: rawSourceId,
      source_table: rawSourceTable,
      confirm_delete: confirmDelete,
      response_code: 400,
      n8n_base_url: n8nBaseUrl,
      sql: "SELECT NULL::bigint AS batch_id, NULL::bigint AS source_id, NULL::text AS source_table, false AS item_exists, false AS can_delete, ''::text AS batch_status, false AS confirm_delete, false AS deleted, NULL::timestamptz AS item_date, NULL::text AS member, NULL::text AS payer, NULL::text AS product, NULL::integer AS regular_tags, NULL::integer AS parent_tags, NULL::integer AS key_tags, NULL::text AS notes;"
    }
  }];
}
const sql = `
WITH requested AS (
  SELECT
    ${sqlLiteral(parsedBatchId)}::bigint AS batch_id,
    ${sqlLiteral(parsedSourceId)}::bigint AS source_id,
    ${sqlLiteral(rawSourceTable)}::text AS source_table,
    ${confirmDelete ? 'true' : 'false'} AS confirm_delete
),
target AS (
  SELECT
    mi.id AS source_id,
    mi.batch_id,
    'signup_batch_manual_items'::text AS source_table,
    mi.created_at AS item_date,
    mi.member,
    mi.payer,
    NULL::text AS product,
    mi.regular_tags,
    mi.parent_tags,
    mi.key_tags,
    mi.notes,
    b.status AS batch_status
  FROM public.signup_batch_manual_items mi
  JOIN public.signup_batches b
    ON b.id = mi.batch_id
  JOIN requested r
    ON r.batch_id = mi.batch_id
   AND r.source_id = mi.id
   AND r.source_table = 'signup_batch_manual_items'

  UNION ALL

  SELECT
    s.id AS source_id,
    s.batch_id,
    'member_signups'::text AS source_table,
    s.signup_date AS item_date,
    s.member,
    s.payer,
    s.product,
    CASE
      WHEN s.product NOT IN ('6. Parent 2026', 'b. Pavilion Key', 'a. Social 2026')
      THEN 1 ELSE 0
    END AS regular_tags,
    CASE WHEN s.product = '6. Parent 2026' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS parent_tags,
    CASE WHEN s.product = 'b. Pavilion Key' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS key_tags,
    NULL::text AS notes,
    b.status AS batch_status
  FROM public.member_signups s
  JOIN public.signup_batches b
    ON b.id = s.batch_id
  JOIN requested r
    ON r.batch_id = s.batch_id
   AND r.source_id = s.id
   AND r.source_table = 'member_signups'
),
deleted_manual AS (
  DELETE FROM public.signup_batch_manual_items mi
  USING target t, requested r
  WHERE r.confirm_delete = true
    AND r.source_table = 'signup_batch_manual_items'
    AND t.batch_status = 'Processing'
    AND mi.id = t.source_id
    AND mi.batch_id = t.batch_id
  RETURNING
    mi.id AS source_id,
    t.batch_id,
    t.source_table,
    t.item_date,
    t.member,
    t.payer,
    t.product,
    t.regular_tags,
    t.parent_tags,
    t.key_tags,
    t.notes,
    t.batch_status
),
deleted_signup AS (
  UPDATE public.member_signups s
  SET batch_id = NULL,
      status = 'New'
  FROM target t, requested r
  WHERE r.confirm_delete = true
    AND r.source_table = 'member_signups'
    AND t.batch_status = 'Processing'
    AND s.id = t.source_id
    AND s.batch_id = t.batch_id
  RETURNING
    s.id AS source_id,
    t.batch_id,
    t.source_table,
    t.item_date,
    t.member,
    t.payer,
    t.product,
    t.regular_tags,
    t.parent_tags,
    t.key_tags,
    t.notes,
    t.batch_status
),
deleted AS (
  SELECT * FROM deleted_manual
  UNION ALL
  SELECT * FROM deleted_signup
)
SELECT
  r.batch_id,
  r.source_id,
  r.source_table,
  (COALESCE(t.source_id, d.source_id) IS NOT NULL) AS item_exists,
  COALESCE(t.batch_status, d.batch_status, '') AS batch_status,
  (COALESCE(t.source_id, d.source_id) IS NOT NULL AND COALESCE(t.batch_status, d.batch_status) = 'Processing') AS can_delete,
  r.confirm_delete,
  (d.source_id IS NOT NULL) AS deleted,
  COALESCE(t.item_date, d.item_date) AS item_date,
  COALESCE(t.member, d.member) AS member,
  COALESCE(t.payer, d.payer) AS payer,
  COALESCE(t.product, d.product) AS product,
  COALESCE(t.regular_tags, d.regular_tags) AS regular_tags,
  COALESCE(t.parent_tags, d.parent_tags) AS parent_tags,
  COALESCE(t.key_tags, d.key_tags) AS key_tags,
  COALESCE(t.notes, d.notes) AS notes
FROM requested r
LEFT JOIN target t ON true
LEFT JOIN deleted d ON true;`;
return [{
  json: {
    batch_id: parsedBatchId,
    source_id: parsedSourceId,
    source_table: rawSourceTable,
    confirm_delete: confirmDelete,
    response_code: 200,
    n8n_base_url: n8nBaseUrl,
    sql,
  }
}];
